summary: Iteration 172: Category icon_svg feature testing - ALL PASS. Backend sanitization, 20KB limit, unsafe SVG blocking, admin UI with live preview and character counter all verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: CategoryIconSvg.jsx properly implements frontend sanitization checks matching backend rules
Backend _is_svg_markup_unsafe function covers all XSS vectors: script, on* handlers, javascript:, foreignObject
20KB limit enforced both in backend (CATEGORY_ICON_SVG_MAX_LENGTH=20000) and frontend UI with character counter
seed_data_creation: Created test categories with icon_svg (test-icon-svg-* slugs) in DE/other module for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: icon_svg feature fully implemented and tested. Categories with icon_svg show icons in admin list and public tree. CategoryIconSvg component used in ExtendedRuntimeBlocks (category navigator, sub-category blocks) and ListingCategorySelect.

5. Block unsafe SVG with foreignObject (HTTP 400) - PASS
8. icon_svg in admin category list - PASS (4 categories found with icon_svg)
9. icon_svg in public category tree - PASS (4 categories found)
